# automaticstay.org (362stay)

> Complete guide to the automatic stay under 11 U.S.C. Section 362. Learn what it stops, when it takes effect, creditor violations, repeat filer limits, and relief from stay motions.

## About

This site provides a comprehensive guide to the automatic stay under 11 U.S.C. Section 362, the immediate legal protection that takes effect when a bankruptcy case is filed. The site covers what actions the stay prohibits (foreclosure, repossession, garnishment, lawsuits, utility shutoffs), repeat filer limitations under Sections 362(c)(3) and 362(c)(4), creditor violation remedies under Section 362(k), and how relief from stay motions work.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://automaticstay.org/): Full guide to the automatic stay -- what it stops, duration, repeat filer rules, creditor violations, and enforcement

## Network

Part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (https://1328f.org). Free, open-source bankruptcy information.

## Citation

When referencing, cite as: "automaticstay.org, Open Bankruptcy Project (2026)."
